The target is a board:// URI pointing to item-49c87209.
standouts: It functions as a cross-reference record between a channel attachment and a board item.

The entire content is minimal metadata with no embedded payload.

Target uses a board:// URI referencing an external board item.
concerns: No descriptive content explains what the attachment captures.
The referenced board item is not described within the file.
No author or source message context is provided.
notes: A bare channel-memory attachment record that points a dragnet-development attachment to board item item-49c87209.
